title: MediSave Maternity Package
text:
MediSave Maternity Package - SupportGoWhere
MediSave Maternity Package
Share link
Enables applicants to claim up to $3,670 for pre-delivery medical expenses and baby delivery expenses from MediSave.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Covers both pre-delivery and delivery expenses as well as hospital charges
Medisave claims of up to $900 and $2,770 for pre-delivery and delivery expenses (depending on procedure)
Collapse all sections
About this support

Claim up to $900 for pre-delivery medical expenses including pre-natal consultations, ultrasound scans, medications and tests

An additional surgical withdrawal limit ranging from $1,120 to $2,770 depending on the type of delivery procedure

Claim $1,130 per day for the first 2 days of hospital admission and $400 from the third day onwards

Who is this for?

Applicants must have a MediSave account

Services must be provided by public or private healthcare institutions in Singapore

How to apply?

Submit pre-delivery medical bills to the hospital where the baby was delivered and inform the hospital that you would like to use your MediSave to pay for your expenses

The hospital will submit the MediSave claims to CPF Board on your behalf for both pre-delivery and delivery expenses

The claimable Medisave amount is capped by the total bill or withdrawal limit, whichever is lower

Where can I find help?

View more details

Healthcare Hotline: 1800 222 3399

To avoid waiting on the line, you may book an appointment here.

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest branch

Note: By appointment only

Scheme last updated 11 Sep 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
